twitch_info.title: We're doing GAY Music 2 Sakura now.

message.body: oh you made that joke in the stream title already
I mean I think it's fine to have one break day once in a while
you usually play very consistently lol
that's a good thing I think
I guess gay sakura would make it so every bullet is curving
like every change is just this attack curves now
this is close to having a beach episode
is red sakura a reference to red people
what a way to spend pride month
you better kiss a beautiful girl once you clear this
have a whole theo and you decide to play ninur
yeah I forgot about it too
i saw a pride flag like 4 days ago on printful building
2 days later i look again and the flag is gone
i feel like doggie buffing my own tower
im gonna wear thigh highs everyday for pride month
i mean a little  ambitious to have a deadline
And with the fact your playing a bunch of other hard stuff
hard and wet: go fuck yourself
i think you might beat it
It’s pride month now so maybe she does
I have like zero energy today it’s fucked up
I was given a monster as part of a gift bag for moving into the apartment
I saw one of the pre finals!!
I LOVE watching your streams. So much.
do you think if I ask your streams out they’ll accept
also the person I started talking to seems awesome soo
The entire time I’ve been moving stuff today I’ve just been thinking about roller coasters
voyage at holiday world should be one of the wonders of the world tho
strip clubs just seem boring af
wait I had a fire idea
the fountain was the most avoidable hit there
yes homo we smokin GAY MUSIC 2 SAKURA!!!
that was the best attempt ive seen
what's like the worst bodily function/feature streamer someone can possibly be my first thought is ingrown toenail streamer
no one wants to be the ingrown toenail streamer
that guy like a month or two ago when embiid got appendicitis right before the playoffs
he actually gets actual generational wealth from that
sixers have seen more ridiculous injuries
a couple years back a guy on the team found out he was allergic to sesame and almost fucking died from it
it feels to me that you're even more depressed than in ninur grind
bored? i didnt expect to hear that
i keep seeing intro 90% of the time when i visiting your stream and i start thinking that its extremely despair avoidance
this has to be the most boring avoidance ever made
it really doesnt seem despair inducing at ALL
its just not built despair like that much
so there's no even a highlight attack that harder than any other? its like constantly hard and boring figght?
its more like you're just on the first few attacks all the time
3 attacks are easy? pattern+circles with aiming and what 3rd one?
okay but highkey was if the intro attack and final swapped places
that would be such a pathetic  thing if this shit takes 200h
what did she mean by this
so have u pass cantata time tho?
getting past final with 0 hits and suddenly you have to play the secret chorus 3 key change that gatekeeps 100%
at chorus 3 there will be another evans-like avoid that u dont know how to approach
also good luck on amazeing miku
least original joke ever I know
have u enjoyed any attack in long miku ftr?
fucked that they did that to the shimeji sim art
girls kissing I gotta see that
you sounded enthralled by the blue archive art
its so nice to see ninur and cantata being perfect at one screen
i mean im not gay but i would lowk  do it
clocking in for the sakura2 grind gay style i see
gay luck have fun. happy pride month
@hedgeflueowo miku's got the lesbians sorted for the stream
you know maybe this isnt very woke of me
but damn this avoidance is kinda boring icl
m2sakura trash... nobody in the hood watching this
bro everyone is tired of this avoidance
I rather listen to this song than ninur
well its no forest song i guess
you did also get to hear more of ninur on average than this song
It's time to start my one-handed IWBTG carrer for the next month schulz12Fine
I broke my left arm a week ago, nothing major though
MY SUGGESTION: play the game 1 handed and spin a fidget spinner with your other hand
just got a trailer for something called girlballs on my youtube homepage
it's for you dawg it's lit
alright so what messed up convs are happening this time
yeah see the moon runs for woonya
although i got both in the same run
i cut it a bit close lol
oh huh not heard of that
well nothing casual can last too long for you anyway
yeah i dont see you often in chat
but seeing u in harpy was cool
how'd harpy found out about them skull?
yeah thats part of why i did a challenge for her
she's part of the treehouse server nal, it was kind of inevitable lol
dying on final and going zen zen dame da...
you get used to being cringe
i honestly can't tell if they ever left
like seth made one not too long ago for people in general
they just aren't at the forefront of things any more
oh yeah i said the same
I'm scared to see Lektphire on this having seen someone post a huge crashout review of it yesterday
idk if you saw it but half the review is "people who caps lock cancel are cheaters and need to stop pretending they're good"
we need to mail all known fangamers stress balls
yeah the conscience line is wild shit
@128up man that would help some people hugely
same but I just accept it lol
the I Wanna community finally gets its first drama channel
did you not see arzs tier list?
that is one hell of a username
and decided it was funny enough to keep
Nanami Challenge 2 in Legend and that's all I remember lol
yeah they turn that off in a month
I could've sworn Sky Blue Denouement was already on there but I guess it wasn't
truly a travesty of a pick
I believe in the delusional first-try screen 8
what's it like being an evil genius
